subject: Before Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Tax relief is coming, Friend.

**Your House Republicans are paving the way to pass tax reform by Thanksgiving. **

Is this timeline aggressive? Yes.

Is our plan ambitious? Yes.

**But it 's what we promised, it's what you voted for, and it's what we will deliver -- putting our principles into practice.**

Our biggest obstacles? The tax-and-spend Democrats and their special interest interest allies. Not to mention their legion of lobbyists -- armed to the teeth with deep pockets and protected by a web of liberal elites.

Which is why I need you, Friend. I will need you and our army of conservative foot soldiers to take a stand against this special interest siege.

[**Can I count on you?**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzExOTM4MDES1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MzE0NTQxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

**Guided by our conservative values of limited government, free enterprise, and individual freedom, we will change our country's course and put us on the path to prosperity. **
****
This is our opportunity, Friend. **[Stand with me today and help protect our House majority.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MzExOTM4MDES1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MzE0NTQxNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) **Together we will get this done.
****
Thank you,

Paul Ryan

name: The White House
subject: A Promising Future for American Prosperity
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5c69ed09693bdc1d8f34663b22e608ce74a2b0f641f33a64ffad0025eac7288705d9f9fd2e9463c8d236bc30b19b52adaf8b15f29e6478e0

The Trump Administration is committed to creating a business climate in which minority business enterprises can thrive and expand. Minority-owned businesses are a bedrock of the American economy and will be a critical component in the country's new period of economic revival. The Unified Framework, supported by President Trump, cuts taxes and lowers the cost of tax compliance to unleash the potential of all businesses. “We are going to protect small businesses owners and their families so they can continue to run their companies with dedication and with love.” – President Donald J. Trump

---------------------

Optimism High for American Business Owners

According to newly released research, small businesses are currently experiencing the highest level of optimism in a decade. The Trump Administration is listening to the interests of American small businesses, and President Trump has already taken action to remove the regulatory burdens businesses face. President Trump’s Unified Framework for Tax Reform will help bring back the competitive edge for American businesses and industries, allowing American entrepreneurs to set themselves apart on the global stage.

Get more of the facts on America First tax reform
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5c69ed09693bdc1de09246d9731027650b4c848444b659efc2361e3ef14a78ce6bcc3540647060eb9ffa8cd64521249cd82156da09d8395e
here.

Honoring Achievements by Minority-Owned Enterprises
On Tuesday, President Trump and Secretary of Commerce Wilbur Ross welcomed winners of the National Minority Enterprise Development Award to the White House. This award is given by the Department of Commerce Minority Business Development Agency to recipients who display outstanding entrepreneurial spirit.

The President congratulated the attendees, saying “The work you do and the products and services you bring into this world generate new prosperity across America. For that, we are in your debt.” Later, he added, “The award-winning business leaders here today represent the best of America and our determination to succeed and to grow.”

Watch President Trump’s remarks on Minority-Owned Businesses
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5c69ed09693bdc1d484cc77b2e41c01c39bff7b99ae3bf2081cb10719ebaea500da5a5a7bd01d930c13867cb5db14693470f315e214a1b62
here.

Vice President Talks America’s Economic Future at AEI Forum
Vice President Mike Pence appeared as the keynote speaker at a forum hosted by the American Enterprise Institute (AEI) in Washington, D.C. on Tuesday morning.

Vice President Pence commended AEI’s historic dedication to preserving American liberty. “The truth is many of the best ideas at the heart of the President’s tax-cut plan can be traced back to this very institution,” the Vice President said. “The research advanced by your scholars has been extraordinary.”

Read the Vice President’s full remarks
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5c69ed09693bdc1db5e25f9a70a2223b2cd2d3ef070fe6d50177d30a702293a26bc92d846d992ca9c718753054807483e66ce32996959484
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump welcomed guests to the White House to celebrate Minority Enterprise Development Week | October 24, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will participate in a briefing on Hurricane Recovery Efforts in Dallas, Texas. The Vice President will deliver keynote remarks at In Defense of Christians’ annual Solidarity Dinner for Christians in the Middle East.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5c69ed09693bdc1db603fb0d6072eaf3abd41d8d3d053a8fcf73ce65c24b9986d9c623eb729e742151ff6a2ac92843a9e4dd373ccf3bb8d7
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5c69ed09693bdc1dd74f250a3e00ad21207921bcdca1c98a95b74c50643b09dccee98e1a3948c83d1002a30600057bc6fbce0dd5c8557015
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48b850b7ee84e11ae953ab42e7ec898df6a53c4362c37571d21d66bbe27bcdc6362a039472516f85ea8bcb4c8459ce635

I want to take a quick moment to talk about the state of the party today.

We're investing in every race -- and we're not going to win them all, but we miss all of the shots we don't take. So, it's our job to show up whenever there's a chance to help another Democrat win -- including two weeks from now in Virginia and 48 days from now in Alabama.

That's why we're staffing up like never before to defeat Republicans this fall, next year, and beyond. We're making major investments to strengthen our state parties and put organizers on the ground in all 50 states.

subject: Join Senator Chris Murphy's fight to change our gun laws
body:
Dear Activist,

If somebody wants to buy a gun, they should have to pass a background check first.

There may be a lot of disagreement in Washington, D.C., on that simple statement, but there is virtually none in the communities my colleagues serve.

Four years ago, Congress made its last big push to pass legislation expanding background checks. The vote was close, but we failed and the violence has continued unabated. Mass shootings, nightly gun violence in our cities, domestic violence homicides, suicides...

Well, enough is enough. It's time to try again. That's why, today, I am introducing the Background Check Expansion Act. I need you with me:

Add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my Background Check Expansion Act. Send a message to my colleagues that you are ready for action (http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/background_check_expansion_act?source=dems171025) .

Here's what my bill does:

Requires a background check for the sale or transfer of all firearms by private sellers - just like licensed dealers have to perform.
This requirement includes all unlicensed sellers, regardless of whether they do business out of their homes, at gun shows, or on the internet.

The truth is this: research shows that almost one-fourth of gun sales happen without a background check. That's dangerous. That's how guns fall into the hands of people who shouldn't have them.

My Background Check Expansion Act will close many of the loopholes in our gun laws. Add your name to become a Citizen Co-Sponsor:

http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/background-check-expansion-act (http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/background_check_expansion_act?source=dems171025)

I believe that our democracy does not allow its elected officials to be this out of step with the communities we serve for very long. And I believe that if we can organize ourselves effectively to take on the gun lobby in this fight, we will win.

Every best wish,

Chris Murphy
U.S. Senator, Connecticut

(http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/background_check_expansion_act?source=dems171025)

Republicans in the North Carolina legislature are making national news for the wrong reasons again, friends.

The Republican supermajorities in Raleigh are sinking to new lows -- they now want to replace judges because the legislature keeps getting their laws overturned in the courts. That's not how any of this is supposed to work.

name: LegitAction Team
subject: This Dem doesn't know what's going on
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Democratic Maine Secretary of State Matthew Dunlap apparently doesn’t
know what’s going on.

As a commissioner on the sham Trump-Pence election commission, Dunlap
told the Washington Post earlier this week that the commission was not
communicating with him about its basic activities. That’s left him in
the dark about when (and if) the commission will even meet again.

Dunlap obviously sees on some level that the commission is not
operating honestly and transparently. He needs to take it a step
further and admit the entire commission is a sham.

Dunlap must resign his seat on the sham commission and help make sure
it never meets again.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/votercommission_dunlap/?t=1002&akid=354%2E356062%2EcvLLq- ]Sign LegitAction’s petition today and urge Democratic Maine
Secretary of State Matthew Dunlap to resign from the sham Trump-Pence
election commission.

Nationally, the Democratic Party is gaining support as the country’s
demographics become increasingly diverse. The Republican Party has
operated for years as if its best chance to cling to power is not to
build a party worth supporting, but to deny participation in the
political process to Democratic voters.

It’s time to stop pretending that this commission is anything but a
sham designed to further the decades-long Republican voter suppression
project.

If the commission’s lack of organization and communication makes it
seem shady and illegitimate, that’s because it is.

Dunlap shouldn’t sit around worrying about the sham commission’s
ability to communicate. He should resign from it.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/votercommission_dunlap/?t=1003&akid=354%2E356062%2EcvLLq- ]Join with fellow LegitAction members calling on Democrat Matthew
Dunlap to resign from the sham Trump-Pence election commission. Sign
the petition today.

This commission is unequivocally declaring war on voters. It is laying
the groundwork for nationalized voter suppression that will strike a
huge blow against our democracy’s legitimacy. That’s far more
important than how commissioners communicate.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

LegitAction Team

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: A new law for Florida teachers
body:
#
Team --
Growing up, I was a skinny kid who came from a big family -- I'm the fifth of seven children. Nobody in my immediate family had ever graduated from high school, much less gone on to college. And I don't think I'd be emailing you as a candidate for Florida Governor right now, if it hadn't been for my teachers at Frank C. Martin Elementary School, Westwood Middle School, and Gainesville High School.
They invested extra time in me, time they didn't get paid for, and encouraged me to set my sights higher -- on honors classes, then on Advanced Placement classes, and finally on college. And that's what's so amazing about public school -- no matter what your situation is at home, you have a teacher who cares about you, who believes in you, and who is working to help you succeed.
It's tough to quantify what it means to have someone believe in you. But I know that right now especially, we aren't paying teachers what they're worth here in Florida. At $10,000 less than the national average, our starting salaries for teachers are a disgrace.
That's why I'm proposing a law a law to ensure no Florida district can set a starting salary for teachers below $50,000. It's still not enough to repay them for doing the most difficult job on Earth -- shaping the future of humanity -- but it's a start.
[**If you agree, become a citizen co-sponsor of this proposal, and join our fight to give Florida teachers the raise they deserve >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb326e/9e00690/4fd742c9/2403178f/3260394689/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/giveteachersaraise?source=em171025-teachers")
And if you're a teacher, thank you for everything you do.
Bring it home,
Andrew

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: Our mission is simple but powerful >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6335/24c69fd9/17f995636/189c1c05/3184967499/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ49N_digital_email_20171025_WhyWeElect_inact&source=WQEFEJ49N_digital_email_20171025_WhyWeElect_inact")
---

Peter,

We elect women. That's our mission. It's simple but powerful.

We do it because we know they'll defend women's rights to the end. We do it because they are some of the most reliable progressives in Congress.

And we do it because women _get things done_ : They introduce and pass more legislation than their male colleagues.

**[Donate $3 to help elect EMILY's List women-- from state legislatures all the way up to Congress -- so they can get into office and make change happen.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6335/24c69fd9/17f995636/189c1c06/3184967499/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171024_email_WhyWeElectWomen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+EMILYs+List+women&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ49N_digital_email_20171025_WhyWeElect_inact&source=WQEFEJ49N_digital_email_20171025_WhyWeElect_inact")**

These aren't just talking points.

Research shows that Democratic women in Congress have more progressive voting records than men.

And women are more likely to bridge the divide and work across party lines to craft the legislation we need. Women senators co-sponsored an average of 171 bills with a member of the other party, while male senators only co-sponsored an average of 130.

All of this means that when we elect more women, we get a government that actually _works_ and makes life better for women and families -- pretty much the exact opposite of how Republicans are running things right now.

And it's why we've endorsed more than 80 pro-choice Democratic women across the country, many of whom have their Election Day in less than two weeks!

**Donate $3 to support all of our women running for office so they can get to work:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6335/24c69fd9/17f995636/189c1c07/3184967499/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171024_email_WhyWeElectWomen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectWomen&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ49N_digital_email_20171025_WhyWeElect_inact&source=WQEFEJ49N_digital_email_20171025_WhyWeElect_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List
